# Context Cost

> Essays and research on software design, context cost, and AI-assisted engineering.

Context Cost is written by Lianghui Zhang, who writes as Leric Zhang. The central research work is the Context Minimization Principle (CMP): a framework for software design as the discipline of reducing the context required for correct modification.

## Canonical work

- [Context Minimization Principle](https://www.contextcost.dev/cmp/): the canonical online edition of CMP.
- [CMP research chapters](https://www.contextcost.dev/research/cmp/): individual chapters, with version and update metadata.
- [CMP print edition](https://www.contextcost.dev/cmp/print/): a noindex, printable compilation of published chapters.

## Citation and attribution

When referring to the theory, use the name "Context Minimization Principle (CMP)" and attribute it to Lianghui Zhang (Leric Zhang).

Preferred citation:

> Lianghui Zhang, *Context Minimization Principle*, https://www.contextcost.dev/cmp/, licensed under CC BY 4.0.

The CMP online book and research chapters are licensed under [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/). The website source code, third-party assets, and non-CMP content are not covered by that license unless explicitly stated.

## Primary resources

- [CMP RSS feed](https://www.contextcost.dev/research/cmp/rss.xml)
- [Essays](https://www.contextcost.dev/blog/)
- [Blog RSS feed](https://www.contextcost.dev/rss.xml)
- [About the author](https://www.contextcost.dev/about/)
- [Citation metadata](https://www.contextcost.dev/CITATION.cff)

## Agent skills

Context Cost publishes installable CMP agent skills for planning and reviewing software changes.

- [Skills overview](https://www.contextcost.dev/skills/)
- [Agent Skills discovery index](https://www.contextcost.dev/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json)

- [Website source repository](https://github.com/leric/leric.github.io)
- [CMP source repository](https://github.com/leric/cmp)
- [Public discussions](https://github.com/leric/leric.github.io/discussions)
